item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-016","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":false,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"回答明确优先留存，并用“漏桶”逻辑说明留存差时增长会浪费获客成本；同时补充样本不足时可做小规模增长用于验证留存，避免机械二选一。没有出现平均分配式建议。"}
